name: the majority of option-bearing tools have a fully-supported render mapping wired into the emitter
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'c=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"]; ob=c.select{|k,v| v["option_form"]}; sup=ob.count{|k,v| v["render"] && v["render"]["supported"]!=false}; STDERR.puts("supported=#{sup}/#{ob.size}"); exit(sup >= (ob.size/2) ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo majority-fully-wired 1>&2
